headline: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN)
description: CNNs are specialized neural networks for grid-structured data (images, video). Key operations: convolution (slide filters over input, detect patterns), pooling (downsample, reduce parameters), fully connected layers (classification). AlexNet (2012) won ImageNet by 10%+ margin, launching the deep learning revolution.

citation.name: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Networks (AlexNet)
citation.author: Krizhevsky, Alex, Sutskever, Ilya, Hinton, Geoffrey
